stories.title: Follow live: Bulls select Purdue's Braden Smith at...
stories.summary: Tune in to ESPN to watch how the second round of the NBA draft plays out.

stories.title: Bickerstaff: Nori's Blazers deal a 'slap in the fa...
stories.summary: J.B. Bickerstaff, coach of the Pistons and president of the National Basketball Coaches Association, calls the structure of new Trail Blazers coach Micah Nori's contract a "slap in the face to our value."

stories.title: Sources: Milan rejects NYCFC approach for Pulisic
stories.summary: AC Milan have rejected an approach by New York City FC for United States attacker Christian Pulisic, with Milan stating that the player isn't available, sources confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Pochettino won't 'risk' USMNT players on yellows
stories.summary: United States manager Mauricio Pochettino said his four players on yellow cards won't start Thursday's match against Türkiye to avoid the possibility of being suspended for the round of 32 match on July 1.

stories.title: Man charged for allegedly stalking Cunningham
stories.summary: An Indiana man was charged on allegations he stalked Fever player Sophie Cunningham and sent her threatening and explicit messages on social media.
